# line2TextProvider

**Instance Property**

The text to display below the image.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var line2TextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property supports multicolor text.

## Setting the Complicaiton Data

- **line1ImageProvider**: The image to display.
